name: Irfan Syed
title: Director of QA
subject: Regression across legacy + cloud
body:
Hello Irfan,

What's harder right now, keeping regression stable across OpenEdge and your cloud products, or keeping test coverage from falling behind as the portfolio grows?

With 12+ products on different stacks, test upkeep tends to double every time release cycles overlap. The older the codebase, the more brittle the tests get.

One insurance company running a similar legacy and cloud mix cut their regression window from 8 to 5 weeks using Testsigma.

If 3 fewer weeks of regression would help the OpenEdge schedule, what day works for a quick look at how they did it?

Best,
Rob

title: Director of QA
subject: Coverage vs feature speed
body:
Hello Katie,

When your team ships new features faster than QA can write tests for them, where do coverage gaps show up first, visual regression, cross browser, or somewhere else?

Scaling a QA org from 10 to 39 is impressive, but test suites don't usually grow at the same rate as the team. The gap shows up when a release ships and something breaks that should have been covered.

Medibuddy hit that point and cut test upkeep in half after automating 2,500 tests with Testsigma.

What day works to see how Medibuddy cut test upkeep in half while keeping coverage ahead of releases?

Best,
Rob
